0.text: Paraseptal emphysematous changes in the upper and lower lobe superior segments of both lungs

1.text: Centriacinar emphysematous changes in the upper and lower lobe superior segments of both lungs

2.text: Segmental peribronchial thickening with luminal narrowing in both lungs

3.text: Subsegmental peribronchial thickening with luminal narrowing in both lungs

4.text: Ground glass opacities in the basal segments of both lower lobes

5.text: Band atelectatic changes in the right lower lobe basal segment

7.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific parenchymal nodules in both lungs
